sqlMap.select:
SELECT AA.CN AS CN, AA.POSITION AS POSITION, AA.DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME, AA.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME AS DEPARTMENTNAME, AA.TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, AA.MAIL AS MAIL, AA.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USERIMAGE FROM ( SELECT CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME, TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, MAIL AS MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptId# AND CN != 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN A.TITLE ELSE A.TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN A.DISPLAYNAME ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, A.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN A.DESCRIPTION ELSE A.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME, A.TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, A.MAIL AS MAIL, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #deptId# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC LIMIT #startPoint#, #listCount#

SELECT COUNT(AA.CN) FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE DEPARTMENT = #deptId# AND CN != 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CN FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE B.DEPTID = #deptId# AND B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) AA

SELECT AA.CN AS CN, AA.POSITION AS POSITION, AA.DISPLAYNAME AS DISPLAYNAME, AA.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, AA.DEPARTMENTNAME AS DEPARTMENTNAME, AA.TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, AA.MAIL AS MAIL, AA.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USERIMAGE FROM ( SELECT CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN TITLE ELSE TITLE2 END AS POSITION, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAYNAME, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1'THEN DESCRIPTION ELSE DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENTNAME, TELEPHONENUMBER AS TELEPHONENUMBER, MAIL AS MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN != 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND $srchOption$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #srchValue#, '%') ) AA ORDER BY EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 ASC, DISPLAYNAME ASC LIMIT #startPoint#, #listCount#

SELECT COUNT(AA.CN) FROM ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN != 'masteradmin' AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND $srchOption$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #srchValue#, '%') ) AA

select s2.cn, s2.shared_type, s2.display_name, s2.department_name, s2.permission, s2.child_permission from ( select u.cn as cn, s.shared_type as shared_type, case when #primary# = '1' then u.displayname else u.displayname2 end as display_name, case when #primary# = '1' then u.description else u.description2 end as department_name, s.permission as permission, s.child_permission as child_permission, s.share_date as share_date from tbl_cb_share s join tbl_usermaster u on s.shared_id = u.cn and s.tenant_id = u.tenant_id and s.shared_type = 2 where s.cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and s.sharer_id = #userId# and s.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s.use_status = 1
$sqlQuery$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#, '%')
union
select d.cn as cn, s1.shared_type as shared_type, case when #primary# = '1' then d.displayname else d.displayname2 end as display_name, case when #primary# = '1' then d.displayname else d.displayname2 end as department_name, s1.permission as permission, s1.child_permission as child_permission, s1.share_date as share_date from tbl_cb_share s1 join tbl_deptmaster d on s1.shared_id = d.cn and s1.tenant_id = d.tenant_id and (s1.shared_type = 0 or s1.shared_type = 1) where s1.cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and s1.sharer_id = #userId# and s1.tenant_id = #tenantId# and s1.use_status = 1
$sqlQuery$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchValue#, '%')
) s2
order by s2.share_date asc
sqlMap.update: update tbl_cb_share set use_status = 0 where cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and sharer_id = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and use_status = 1
sqlMap.select: select ifnull(max(share_id), 0) from tbl_cb_share where tenant_id = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: select 1 from dual where not exists (select share_id, cabinet_id from tbl_cb_share where cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and sharer_id = #userId# and shared_id = #sharedId# and shared_type = #shareType# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)
insert.isEqual: insert into tbl_cb_share ( share_id, cabinet_id, sharer_id, sharer_name1, sharer_name2, shared_id, shared_type, permission, share_date, child_permission, use_status, company_id, tenant_id ) values ( #shareId#, #cabinetId#, #userId#, #userName1#, #userName2#, #sharedId#, #shareType#, #permission#, #shareDate#, #childPermission#, 1, #company#, #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: update tbl_cb_share set use_status = 1, permission = #permission#, child_permission = #childPermission# where cabinet_id = #cabinetId# and sharer_id = #userId# and shared_id = #sharedId# and shared_type = #shareType# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
